== Caro-Kann Defence ==
After 2...d5, White usually continues with [[/3. Nf3/|3. Nf3]], entering the Two Knights Attack. If [[/3. d4|3. d4]] is played, the position transposes to the Classical Variation of the Caro-Kann.
